data_standards.description: Serialization contract this system enforces at its API boundary: how datetimes, dates, numbers, and booleans must be sent and are returned. Any agent writing through this system MUST conform. Prevents silent corruption such as a 13:00 local meeting landing at 15:00 because a naive time was read as UTC.

api_timezone.description: IANA zone or 'UTC' the API stores and returns datetimes in. A naive datetime sent to the API is interpreted as this zone.

business_timezone.description: IANA zone humans and agents author times in. A naive local time (a 13:00 meeting) means this zone and MUST be converted to api_timezone before writing.

datetime_format.description: Expected datetime string format, e.g. 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss' (ISO 8601).

date_format.description: Expected date-only format, e.g. 'YYYY-MM-DD'. Date-only fields carry no timezone and MUST NOT be tz-converted.

time_format.description: Expected time-of-day format when a field is time-only, e.g. 'HH:mm:ss'.

number_format.description: Decimal separator and grouping the API expects, e.g. dot-decimal with no grouping ('1234.56').

boolean_encoding.description: How booleans are represented on the wire, e.g. '1/0' or 'true/false'.

docs_ref.description: URL to the vendor's data-format documentation.
